name: micro-verbose-noskill
description: Combination lever: verbose read/grep tool descriptions (lever 3, which lifted tier-1 single-call precision) PLUS the coding-discipline skill disabled (lever 2, which lifted tier-2/3 chains+edits). The two winners from the first sweep help non-overlapping tiers, so this tests whether their gains stack. Regression guard still applies: edit/write must stay present and working with the skill off.
